summary: Iteration 2 regression for RRDC GO. Backend: 21/21 pytest pass covering /api/groups, /api/groups/{code}/campers, /api/camper/login (valid+invalid), /auth/me with camper token, /admin/roster, /admin/roster-status, /admin/roster-sync, /admin/map-pins CRUD + active toggle, /api/map-pins (camper view returns only active), spawn flow with pin coords, per-camper bank isolation, admin guards reject camper tokens, /spawn/current requires auth, legacy /auth/login still mounted. Scheduler log confirmed: 'Scheduler started; nightly sync at 00:00 America/New_York' and CamperSnap sync returned 852 campers / 39 groups. Frontend: 39 group cards render with camp background image, B01 shows 18 campers sorted by last_name, search filter works, play button logs in and redirects to /map, Google Maps hybrid view loads correctly (after frontend restart to pick up REACT_APP_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY), Logout works, /collection shows 'My Pokedex' with camper full name (Colton Ahern). Admin: tabs Analytics/Roster/Pokemon/Map Pins/Spawns present (no legacy Campers tab); Roster tab Sync Now works; Map Pins admin tab loads Google Maps with 'Drop a pin' UI.

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key 5bf6e170-5ebb-4c4e-8b8d-e49d3f63faf6'. Likely duplicate camper id rendered in roster list — could indicate a roster sync producing two entries with same UUID (different group?) or a missing key prefix in RosterTab. Investigate de-dupe or use composite key.

action_items: (LOW) Align AdminPage Map Pins tab data-testid: change tab id from 'pins' to 'map-pins' OR update spec — current is functional but inconsistent with test plan testid 'admin-tab-map-pins'.
(LOW) Investigate React duplicate-key warning on admin Roster tab. Use composite key like `${group_code}-${camper.id}` in RosterTab list rendering, or de-dupe roster API response.
(INFO) Frontend needed a restart to pick up REACT_APP_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY after .env change — confirm release process restarts frontend on env updates.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py maybe_create_spawn correctly attaches latitude/longitude/pin_name when active pins exist; gracefully degrades to None when no pins (per design).

sync_roster uses uuid5(NAMESPACE_URL, first|last|group_code) — STABLE across re-syncs which is great. However, a camper moving between groups would get a new id and lose their bank — acceptable trade-off but worth documenting.
/api/admin/roster-sync is admin-protected and synchronous (awaits sync_roster); acceptable for ~1s response with 852 campers.
Scheduler uses CronTrigger(hour=0, minute=0) with pytz America/New_York — correct.
/api/camper/login does NOT use brute-force lockout (no check_lockout) since camper_id is a UUID, low risk; OK.
/api/map-pins (camper view) excludes inactive pins via {active:True} filter — verified in tests.
All admin endpoints reject camper tokens (get_current_admin checks role=='admin') — verified.
Mongo _id excluded everywhere via projection {_id:0} — no leaks.
Minor: /api/admin/roster aggregation does not exclude trailing whitespace/case variance in group_code, but sync normalizes via .upper().strip(). OK.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; 1 testid mismatch + 1 React key warning)

test_credentials: Admin: admin/Camp1993. Camper: dynamic — first camper of B01 from CamperSnap roster (e.g., Colton Ahern). camper_id is uuid5-derived stable id.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_Pin1 (active), TEST_PinInactive, activate one Pokemon as TEST_LegendarySpawn for catch flow. mongo fixture cleans TEST_-prefixed pins on setup AND teardown. Pokemon TEST_LegendarySpawn left active in DB after run (use admin to deactivate or rely on next iteration's reset).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py (21 tests) plus legacy /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py. IMPORTANT: any module-scoped DB-cleanup fixture must be autouse=True OR be requested by the very first test that depends on its DB state — otherwise pytest's lazy fixture invocation will run cleanup AFTER tests that don't request the fixture (this caused TEST pins to be wiped mid-run). Frontend testids: group-card-<CODE>, camper-row-<id>, camper-search-input, play-camper-<id>, back-to-groups-btn; admin tabs admin-tab-{analytics,roster,pokemon,pins,spawns} (note: 'pins' not 'map-pins'). Frontend was restarted once to pick up REACT_APP_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY.
rca of the issue: Initial test failures in test_spawn_includes_pin_coordinates and test_admin_delete_pin were caused by a TEST FIXTURE BUG (not a product bug): the module-scoped `mongo` fixture had a setup-time `delete_many({name: /^TEST_/})` cleanup, but pytest only invokes a fixture lazily when first requested. Since the first test to request `mongo` was the spawn test, the cleanup ran AFTER pin-creation tests, wiping TEST_Pin1. Fix: marked the fixture autouse=True so it runs before any test in the module. After fix, all 21 tests pass.
